ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "father_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate's father */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the candidate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's photo */,
  "resume_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's resume */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department within the hospital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the role belongs to */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the role */,
  "required_experience_years" INTEGER /* Required years of experience for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who applied */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the candidate applied to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the candidate applied for */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the candidate belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., Selected, Waitlisted) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the candidate's interview */,
  "interviewer" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the application record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that was selected */,
  "selection_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate was selected */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the selected candidate */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the selected candidate is expected to start */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract (if applicable) */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the selection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the selection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_selections_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, recruiter) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
